name: LaTeX.css

en.when_to_use: Use it when semantic HTML must reliably resemble a LaTeX paper with an abstract, author block, theorems, and references instead of hand-written CSS, which fails to keep Libertinus font metrics, theorem environments, and printed-paper feel consistent. Do not use it for general application UI or actual TeX compilation.
en.why_valuable: AI can mimic about 70% of an academic page but cannot reliably reproduce the font stack, heading hierarchy, theorem counters, citation styles, and print breaks. Classless rules let AI provide only semantic HTML.

data_in.note: Input is a trusted semantic HTML string. The library is classless document CSS; it does not parse Markdown or LaTeX.

schema.html: string -- semantic HTML such as article/section/h1..h6/p/blockquote/table

when_to_use: 需要把语义 HTML 稳定排成 LaTeX 论文式摘要、作者块、定理和参考文献时用它而非手写 CSS，因为原生在 Libertinus 字体度量、定理环境和打印纸感的一致性上失败；非做通用应用 UI 或真正的 TeX 编译。
why_valuable: AI 默认能模仿约 70% 的学术纸面，但做不到稳定复现字体栈、标题层级、定理计数器、引用样式和打印断点；classless 规则让 AI 只需给语义 HTML。

data_in.note: 输入是可信的语义 HTML 字符串；库是 classless 文档 CSS，不负责 Markdown/LaTeX 解析。

carriers.widget: conditional:CSS link 必须放入 shadowRoot；字体由 CSS 相对路径从同一 jsDelivr 包加载，宿主需允许 font-cdn
carriers.codex: supported:纯 CSS + 语义 HTML；无 wasm、worker 或 uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: 纯 CSS 无 JS;boot 追加 <link>(artifact→document.head,可改指 shadowRoot)。style.css 基础规则用全局元素选择器 body(L154/188)/html(L171)/:root 变量(L103),shadow 内不匹配 → 需 body/html/:root→:host 重写才成立;字体经相对路径 ./fonts/*.woff2 从同包加载,需 font-cdn 放行。无 body 追加、无事件监听。

minimal.html:
On the Convergence of Gradient Descent

Ada Lovelace
Analytical Engine Laboratory, Cambridge

Abstract

We give a short, self-contained proof that gradient descent converges linearly on smooth, strongly convex objectives. The argument uses only elementary inequalities and makes the role of the condition number explicit.

1. Introduction

Gradient descent is the workhorse of continuous optimization. Given a differentiable objective f, the iterates are defined by xk+1 = xk − η∇f(xk), where η > 0 is a fixed step size.

Let f be μ-strongly convex and L-smooth. With step size η = 1/L, the iterates satisfy ‖xk − x∗‖² ≤ (1 − μ/L)k ‖x0 − x∗‖².
Expanding the squared distance and combining strong convexity with smoothness yields a contraction factor of (1 − μ/L) at each step. Iterating this bound over k steps gives the claim.

References

  1. Cauchy, A. (1847). Méthode générale pour la résolution des systèmes d’équations simultanées.
  2. Nesterov, Y. (2004). Introductory Lectures on Convex Optimization. Springer.
